title: Iron Man
description: Billionaire Tony Stark builds a powered suit of armor to save the world and becomes Iron Man, sparking the beginning of the Marvel Cinematic Universe.

title: The Avengers
description: Earth's mightiest heroes must come together and learn to fight as a team to stop the mischievous Loki and his alien army from enslaving humanity.

title: Captain America: The Winter Soldier
description: Steve Rogers struggles to embrace his role in the modern world and teams up with Black Widow to battle a powerful yet shadowy enemy.

title: Guardians of the Galaxy
description: A group of intergalactic criminals must pull together to stop a fanatical warrior with plans to purge the universe.

title: Avengers: Infinity War
description: The Avengers and their allies must be willing to sacrifice all in an attempt to defeat the powerful Thanos before his blitz of devastation ends the universe.

title: Avengers: Endgame
description: After the devastating events of Infinity War, the Avengers assemble once more to undo Thanos' actions and restore order to the universe.

title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
description: Peter Parker seeks Doctor Strange's help after his identity is revealed, but things go wrong and multiverse villains invade his world.

title: Doctor Strange in the Multiverse of Madness
description: Doctor Strange teams with a mysterious teenager who can travel through multiverses, facing off against other-dimensional forces to protect their world.
